name: livespec-implementation-local
description: Project-local marketplace exposing the single livespec-implementation plugin to contributors of this repository. Wired into .claude/settings.json so the plugin auto-enables when claude is launched from this repo (no --plugin-dir / no /plugin install needed).

plugins.name: livespec-implementation
plugins.description: Repo-local implementation workflow for livespec — discovers implementation gaps against SPECIFICATION/, manages them as beads issues, drives gap-closing implementation cycles. Project-local dogfooding only; NOT shipped under .claude-plugin/. The `source` is resolved relative to the parent of the marketplace's .claude-plugin/ directory (the plugin root); `./.claude-plugin` therefore points to the directory containing this plugin's plugin.json — same convention as the shipped livespec marketplace.
